page_content: Courses required for the minor, in this order, are: FREN204 French Grammar and Composition 3 FREN250 Introduction to Cultural and Textual Analysis 3 FREN301 Composition and Style 3 FREN387 Critical Writing on France and the French-Speaking 3 World Select three of the following: 1 9 FREN302 Introduction to Translation or FREN303 Translation: English to French FREN311 Advanced Oral Expression or FREN312 France Today FREN351 From Romanticism to the Age of Modernism and Beyond FREN352 From the Age of Epic and Romance to the Enlightenment Any 4XX-level course/s 1
